subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 788368008/251225630 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (Florida Tech) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 788368008/251225630 at 15:06:43.51 UT
on 25 December 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."
